nodes.name: 馬拉尼翁河
nodes.summary: 馬拉尼翁河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Croaking ground dove、灰颏隐蜂鸟、安第斯蜂鸟等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia's departments of Caquetá, Putumayo, and Amazonas; in the eastern half of Ecuador; and in northern Peru south at least to the Río Marañón and perhaps further to the rios Ucayali and Cushabatay. Though some maps show its range extending into far western Brazil, the SACC has no records from that country.Remsen, J
